_comment: Copy this file to bench/config.json (gitignored) and fill api_key (or set the env var named by api_key_env) plus models_under_test. A resolved, non-empty key is the single switch that takes the pipeline live: --batch then makes real calls; --selftest/--dry-run always use the mock model and need no key. The default models_under_test is a capability gradient within one family (a result in itself); add an external provider by pointing base_url/provider elsewhere.
